reasons: H_Mech pilot passes: encoder-driven mechanism confirmed (B≈D, C≈A)
H_Comp pilot passes: monotonic absorption increase confirmed (0.585→0.673→0.802)
H_Pareto pilot passes: detectable difference across L0 levels (>0.1 threshold met)
cand_p1 weighted score 4.00 exceeds ADVANCE threshold of 3.5
All H_Mech falsification criteria met: encoder sufficient, decoder irrelevant
Clear experimental path: 5 seeds H_Mech (45min), 6×3 H_Comp (35min), 4×3 H_Pareto (40min)
Resource efficiency: ~2 hours total GPU, all tasks <1 hour budget

Run h_comp_full: 6 cosine levels (0.5-0.95) × 3 seeds, expect R² > 0.8
Run h_pareto_full: 4 L0 levels (16, 32, 64, 128) × 3 seeds, fit Pareto frontier shape
Investigate Gemma Scope zero absorption diagnostic before H_Safe revival
Obtain Neuronpedia annotations for real safety-relevant features
Conditional: Revive cand_safe after diagnostic resolves and real annotations available
Conditional: Pilot cand_encreg after H_Mech full validates encoder-driven mechanism across 5 seeds
